Notice Of Motion For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-24-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar for a request for judgment to Quiet Title against Defaulted Defendants Bay View Bank, aka Bay View Bank, A National Association akak Bay View Bank, National Association aka Bay View Bank and All Persons Unknown Claiming Any Legal or Equitable Right, Title, Estate, Lien or Interest in the Property described in the complaint adverse to Plaintiff's title, or any cloud on Plaintiff's title thereto.

Dept.505: Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings reported by "For the Record", commencing at 9:31:44 a.m., and concluding at 9:47:31 a.m. (D505)

Appearances made:
Zachary Schorr, Esq. representing Plaintiff Rebecca Tova Greenberg, who was placed under oath and testified via Zoom Video Conference.

Counsel to provide a summary in support of the request for judgment.
Court examines Plaintiff. Plaintiff testifies.

Proposed judgment is discussed.
Counsel confirms with the Court that the request for judgment shall resolve the entire case.

Matter is submitted. The Court render its ruling.

Good cause appearing, the Court finds that the Plaintiff has proven its prima facie case and rules in favor of the Plaintiff against the Defendants as follows:

TITLE IS QUIETED TO PLAINTIFF'S SOLE OWNERSHIP INTEREST IN THE PROPERTY AGAINST ANY LEGAL OR EQUITABLE RIGHT, TITLE, ESTATE, LIEN, OR INTEREST IN THE PROPERTY OR ANY CLOUD ON TITLE THEREIN THAT IS CLAIMED BY DEFAULTED DEFENDANTS. REAL PROPERTY SUBJECT IS LOCATED AT 395 17TH AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA 94121 ALSO KNOWN AS 5300 GEARY BOULEVARD, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA 94118 - SEE SCANNED JUDGMENT

Zachary Schorr, Esq. representing Plaintiff Rebecca Tova Greenbarg via Zoom Video Conference.

Counsel and Plaintiff not appearing at the calling of the matter.

Plaintiff failed to provide the Court courtesy copies pursuant to Local rule 2.7b(3).

The Court takes the matter off calendar pursuant to the non-appearance of the moving party and Local rule 2.7b(5).
